hero.title: Your Financial Future on Blockchain

security.title: Security & Control

fees.title: Low Fees
fees.description: No intermediaries. Fees up to 10x lower than traditional funds.

about.title: About Ethernal
about.description: Ethernal combines blockchain security with traditional financial planning to offer you a decentralized, transparent, and accessible retirement experience for everyone.

survey.title: Retirement & Blockchain Survey
survey.subtitle: Help us understand how you perceive retirement and blockchain technology
survey.bannerText: Help us improve! Take our short survey on retirement and blockchain.
survey.question2: Do you trust traditional retirement systems (pension funds, 401k)?
survey.question3: How familiar are you with blockchain/DeFi?
survey.question4: How concerned are you about your financial future in retirement?
survey.question5: Do you currently have a retirement plan?
survey.question7: Would you be interested in a blockchain-based retirement plan?
